horoscopes.title: Aries April Horoscope
content: The month of April will begin with a powerful full moon in Libra, which rules your relationships will bring an important event connected with partner, client or a close connection. The impact of the full moon will last for the next six months, so the important events can come in the next six months. This is the time for a reality check in the relationships, and you will attend some social gatherings too. Venus will be in the second house and on 3rd it will square Pluto which can bring some arguments with your social circles. There will be some issues connected with finances, team settings, and long-term goals too.

As the month progress, there will be some emotional problems as Mercury, and Mars are moving through the twelfth house, so you will be a bit withdrawn, and you will be recalling the past events, and can trigger your anger. This will change when Mars move into your first house on the 9th house, and that phase will bring happiness, energy and more confidence. Mercury also will move into your first house on 14th, will give you a good idea about how to solve your personal issues. The new moon will rise in your first house on 17th will bring opportunities for a personal reset, by bringing new projects, focus on your appearance, and life direction.

The final part of April will be all about your financial stability as the Sun and Venus will be in Taurus, so, your focus will turn to improve your income, budgeting and building up your wealth. On the 19th Sun will move into Taurus, and you will also get new job opportunities, so job seekers should expand the job search. Venus will move into your third house on 24th which will bring smoother conversations with siblings, or old friends. There will be short trips, better social interactions, and you will feel much better than the way you started this month.

horoscopes.title: Taurus April Horoscope
content: The month of April will open with a strong focus about your daily life, routine and wellbeing as the full moon will rise in your sixth house on the 1st. This will bring completion at work, or in your health habits, and it may take six months as the impact of the full moon will last until that time. You will wrap up a project, confront a workplace issues, or realise that a routine is no longer sustainable. On the 3rd Venus in your first house will square Pluto in the tenth house can create some issues at workplace, but there will be problem solving sessions as well. Please make sure you are not being a rebel at work.

Until 9th Mars will be in the eleventh house and Mercury will be in the same house until 14th, so you will spend more time with friends, and collective projects. The situation will change after when both the planets move into the twelfth house, making you withdraw from the scene, embracing silence and loneliness. These transits will make you work behind the scenes, do some charity projects, go for meditation, and foreign trips. Both the planets are fast and furious, so you may feel a bit under the weather too.

By the final lapse of April, you will regain the strength as the Sun will enter your sign, so this is the solar return time for Taurus Sun natives. However, Taurus Sun, Moon and rising signs, will find this as a time for a cosmic reset of your personal life. You will be more visible, ready to take initiatives, and this is the beginning of our personal season, so you can expect new changes even in your appearance. Venus will move into your second house on 24th will bring some gains, and there will be multiple opportunities to get a new job as well.

horoscopes.title: Gemini April Horoscope
content: For vibrant Gemini Sun, Moon and rising signs, April will be the starting point for their creative ventures as on the 1st, the full moon will rise in the fifth house. This will activate a turning point in romance, creativity, or something you find as a passion. The full moon indicates completion, so you will confess your love or end your relationship in the next six months. If you have been working on a creative project, it will reach a milestone, where you decide to continue or quit. This is a very crucial time for children, as they will have some important project too. This full moon will bring entertainment events, where you attend with a young group.

As the month move forward, your focus will shift into your career and ambitions, as Mars and Mercury will be here, so, there will be conversations with authority figures, or you will be making important moves in the professional matters. Since both are furious planets, you will have some work related pressure too. Both the planets will move into the eleventh house by the first and second week, you will try to make new connections from personal and business sphere, but there are chances for arguments too. You will be working in an environment full of competition, so, make sure to prepare yourself for that.

On the 17th, the new moon will rise in your eleventh house, so it will bring new opportunities for job, and collaborations. The last phase of April will witness solar transit into the twelfth house, that will bring cosmic closure about your personal life, like you leaving some plans, and preparing yourself for the future emotionally, physically and spiritually. On the 24th Venus will move int your first house, and that will make you noticeable, also lift your mood, that will bring new opportunities by making you more visible.

horoscopes.title: Cancer April Horoscope
content: April will begin with a personal shift as the full moon will rise in your fourth house on the first, which will bring some changes. The impact of the full moon will last for the next six months, so you can expect events like family gatherings, real estate deals, home improvement projects in the next six months. The full moon indicates closure, so it can also be like you finding some solutions for a lingering family problem. On the 3rd Venus will square Pluto which will bring financial issues, so you have to be careful with the expenses. A hidden truth will surface, forcing you to reassess the reality of your relationships and joint ventures.

Mars and Mercury will be in Pisces, which rules your ninth house for very short time, until the second week, you will plan for long trips, education or long term plans. Since both are fast and furious planets, you will have to be careful with your travel plans as there are chances for blocks. You will also start learning, writing and publishing your works, which will increase your confidence too. On the 9th Mars will move into the tenth house, and it will be there for the next forty days, so you will have a long time to reset your career, to have important conversations about your future, and meetings with powerful figures.

By the last phase of April your energy will move into the eleventh house, as the Sun will move into the earth sign of Aries on the 19th. Your focus will naturally shift into the friendships, collaborations, and long-term dreams. For the next thirty days you will get team work, online and offline meetings, and charity ventures. This transit will bring the closest opportunities to get a new job, new friends and also have long term investments. Venus will move into Gemini, which rules your twelfth house, so a private connection will develop, and you will have intuitive dreams.

horoscopes.title: Leo April Horoscope
content: The fourth month of April will start with full moon in Libra which rules your third house, that will bring closures in a project from communication based domain. You will complete some projects in teaching, preaching and communication related domain. There will be some events like short trips, meetings and problem solving sessions with siblings and relatives. The impact of the full moon on the 3rd Venus will square Pluto in your seventh house will bring new opportunities in business, and there are chances for some clashes with your clients. There are chances for some power struggles with your partner, but that will after the 5th.

Mars and Mercury will control the financial matters for a very short time, but this will be a complex transit. Until 14th you will be dealing with joint finances, debts or emotional issues which were consuming your happiness and peace. This is not a safe transit, so make sure you are patient, as two furious planets can damage the situation at any time until 14th. You will be concerned about your relationships, and you feel the vulnerability in the relationships. After 14th things will get stable, and from then onwards you will focus on your long trips, education and spiritual matters as Mars and Mercury will be in the ninth house. You will have conversations about legal matters, global ventures, and pilgrimages.

By the last phase of April, you will be working hard to improve your career as the Sun will enter the tenth house. This transit will bring the closest opportunity to find a new job, and events for public appearance. On the 24th Venus will move into the 11th house, and from then onwards, you will get new friends, and collaborations. There will be online and offline meetings, you will build valuable networks and people will appreciate you for your efforts.

horoscopes.title: Virgo April Horoscope
content: The first day of April will start with a powerful full moon in the air sign of Libra, which rules your second house, and that will bring a turning point in finances, income and your self-worth. The impact of the full moon will last for the next six months, so, you will have the closest opportunities to start a new job in the next six months or upskilling as well. You may receive a payment, close a loan, or solve some family issues. On the 3rd, Venus will square Pluto, that will bring some blocks in the travel and education, but you will progress after the square ends.

Mars and Mercury will impact the seventh house until fourteenth, and the combined effect will be active until ninth. Both the planets will bring a lot of communication with the partner, client, or with a close connection. Both Mars and Mercury are fast and furious planets, so there are chances for issues in the relationships, so you will have to be careful. After 14th Mars and Mercury will be in the eighth house and the new moon also will rise here on 17th, which will make you restructure your finances, carefully investigate your joint account and solve a financial issue.

The Sun will move into the ninth house on the 19th, and you will be searching for travel plans, pursue studies, or look for global ventures. You will enrol in a course which you always wanted to learn, and that will surely help you in your career. The ninth house indicates writing, publishing and media related activities, so you will get such opportunities too. On the 24th, Venus will move into Gemini, which rules your tenth house, and that will bring new job opportunities, so, this will be a bright period to get recognition, appreciation, and professional progress.

horoscopes.title: Libra April Horoscope
content: April will begin with a powerful and emotional full moon in your sign leaving you rethink about your personal life and putting you in the spotlight. The full moon will rise on the first, so you will be attending social gatherings, one on one meetings and an image makeover session as well. The full moon indicates closures, so you will close one chapter in your life, like you making a personal decision to end a relationship or an ongoing project. On the 3rd Venus will square Pluto which will make you rethink about your love life, children and creative projects too.

When the month starts, Mars will be in Pisces, which rules your sixth house and Mercury also be there impacting your daily life. You will juggle responsibilities at your work, and you will have some deadlines too. The health also will be very important, and you will have to address your health issues, so you will take up some healthcare practices as well. There will be some work related pressure also, and you have to be careful with your colleagues as there are chances for arguments. After the 14th, the combined effect of Mercury and Mars will be visible in the relationship sector, so you will start a new relationship this month, which can be personal or business.

The solar transit will enter Taurus on the 19t, and it will push you to focus on joint ventures, shared finances, and partnerships. The Sun is not good or bad here as it has its own positives and negatives. You will get the clear picture of your financial matters, and you will be forced to restructure them. Sudden expenses will be the part of this transit, and you have to be very careful with that. Venus will move into Gemini on the 24th, from then onwards you will try to go for long trips, enrol in a course, take up global ventures and spend time in writing.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio April Horoscope
content: The month of April will highlight your emotional self as the full moon will rise in the sign of Libra on the first. This Moon will bring private matters to the light, and you will understand the unclear emotions which you were going through. You may feel the need to be silent and withdrawn, but this is a normal process when the full moon rises in the twelfth house of isolation and detachment. This full moon will push you towards healing, prayer, meditation and foreign collaborations. On the 3rd Venus will square Pluto, which will create tension at home, so, you will have to work hard to bring harmony.

Mars, and Mercury will be in Pisces, which will bring many opportunities to explore your creative skills, so you can expect some passion projects. However, the Mars Mercury duo will bring conflicts in team ventures, so make sure you are not arguing with anyone if you want progress in the ventures. Please don’t share your trade secret with anyone, otherwise they will use them against you. You will spend more time with youngsters, and parents will be active with the children. After the 14th, the combined effect of Mars and Mercury will impact the sixth house, you will have more responsibilities at work, and there will be minor health issues too.

The final phase of April will bring more focus on personal or professional relationships as the Sun will move into Taurus which rules your seventh house. You will be more aware of your role in the relationships, and you will be demanding too. The Sun in the seventh house has no directional strength, so, you have to be patient with others. You will be attending social gatherings for sure but make sure you are not fussy. Venus will move into Gemini, which rules your eighth house, and that will be a solution for your financial issues.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius April Horoscope
content: You will start the month with an increased enthusiasm to attain your maximum productivity as the full moon will rise in Libra, which rules your eleventh house on the first itself. This moon will bring closures in some projects which you were working for a long time, so that you can start a new project in the near future. Someone from your friend circle will step away, but you should not be bothered about that, as somethings are destined to happen for your wellbeing. This Moon will make you rethink about your team settings and collaborative projects. On the 3rd Venus will square Pluto and that will bring some complex projects at the workplace.

Mars and Mercury will impact your fourth house until 14th, and you will have a lot of work until then, and you have to take up a lot of responsibilities. Both the planets are fast and furious, so you will have some arguments at home, tensions, and it can also be property disputes. You will feel the need to speak the truth, despite it disrupting the peace at home, but you should speak the truth with love. There will be home improvement projects, relocation, renovation and family meetings. After the 14th the combined impact of Mars and Mercury will bring docus in your creative matters, children and love.

By the final lapse of April, the Sun will move into your sixth house, so your focus will return to your work, health, and keeping a better daily routine. Job seekers will have the closest opportunities to find a new job, so they should expand the job search. You will also try to take up new health care practice too, so, you will take up new diet or medication. The workplace arguments will happen, and that can bring long lasting damages, so stay away from them.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn April Horoscope
content: The month of April will start with a powerful full moon in Libra, which rules your tenth house on the 1st itself. You will have more visibility at work, and that can bring completion of a project, more visibility, or you leaving a project, job or company, after realising it is not justifying your goals. The impact of the full moon will last for the next six months, so you can expect such changes in that time period. Please make sure you don’t take anything emotional at work; otherwise, things will turn against you. If you are a business owner, please avoid the first week to make crucial decisions.

Mars and Mercury will impact the third house until 14th, so you will be mentally active, so, you will be having a lot of communications, or there will be conflicts in the daily life. Your speech will be a bit harsh, so you should control your tongue. There will be short travels, projects from communication based domain and multiple meetings which can be online or offline. Your siblings, neighbours or friends will have some important events in their life. After the fourteenth both the planets will impact the home, so there will be family functions, repairs, renovation or relocation.

The Sun will enter your fifth house on the nineteenth, and that will make you highly expressive, so you want to enjoy your life, work in passion projects, and single Capricorn Sun, Moon or rising natives will go on dates. The second half of the month will be much better than the first half as the solar transit will bring some lighter moments after a heavier responsibility you had in the first half. This solar transit will put you on spotlight as your creative skills will be noted by the public. You will also go for entertainment programs as the fifth house also indicates partying and celebrations with a young group.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius April Horoscope
content: The full moon will rise in the air sign of Libra, which rules your ninth house on the 1st itself, so for the next six months, you will get the closest opportunities for long distance travels, higher studies and global ventures. The full moon indicates closure, so you will finally get an opportunity to start a course, which you always wanted to pursue, or you will complete an ongoing course. You will also get an opportunity to get a global venture, go for pilgrimage, or publish your articles. The impact of the full moon will last for the next six months, so these things will come up in the next six months.

The combined impact of Mars and Mercury will be visible in the second house of money matters so there will be a lot of expenses as both are fast and furious planets. Your constant thoughts will be about money, income, and stability, and there will be huge concern about your rising expenses, so you will have to control them. From fourteenth onwards, both the planets will impact the third house, so the second half will be busier than the first half. You will have a lot of short trips, multiple projects from communication based domain, and meetings too. The Sun will move into the fourth house on the 19th of April which will bring important events at home, and you can expect an active home environment for the next thirty days from then. You will be spending more time with family, and there will be a lot of family responsibilities too. There will be real estate deals, home improvement projects, discussions about ancestral property, plans for relocation and family meetings as well. The Sun doesn’t like to be in the fourth house, so there will be arguments at home, and you must stay away from that.

The Sun will move into the fourth house on the 19th of April which will bring important events at home, and you can expect an active home environment for the next thirty days from then. You will be spending more time with family, and there will be a lot of family responsibilities too. There will be real estate deals, home improvement projects, discussions about ancestral property, plans for relocation and family meetings as well. The Sun doesn’t like to be in the fourth house, so there will be arguments at home, and you must stay away from that.

horoscopes.title: Pisces April Horoscope
content: April will begin with an intense full moon in the eighth house, which is not the favourite place of the Moon, rather it dislikes to be here. So, for the next six months, your financial matters will be very important, but this transit is a red flag. You will focus on settling loans, understanding joint ventures, managing joint accounts, and restructuring your financial matters. The Moon indicates emotions, and in the eighth house, you will have emotional concerns, and you may choose some healing practices too. There will be sudden expenses, so you have to be prepared for that, ad you should control them.

Mars and Mercury, both will impact your first house until fourteenth, so you will be energized, but emotionally vulnerable too. Your speech will be direct, and others will notice your assertiveness, where others can misunderstand you. You will also try to improve your physical health, image makeover, and you will also buy new attire to improve your appearance. Mars and Mercury will move into your second house, so throughout this month, the financial matters will be very sensitive, so you should practice some austerities. However, this month can bring some job opportunities, so expand the job search.

The solar transit will enter Taurus, and that will make you busier as it will impact the third house. You will have multiple engagements like multiple projects, conversations and online or offline meetings. There will be minor health issues due to the multitasking, so the neck to shoulder area needs more care. Siblings or network circles will have a lot of needs, and they will contact you for the support. This transit will also bring opportunities to buy electronic gadgets too, but there are chances for them to get damaged too. Venus will move into the fourth house on the 24th, and that will bring peace at home.
